settings.block_des: Explore our selection of professional salon-grade depilatory wax warmers and equipment, from wax warmers for hair removal to roll-on cartridges, warmer inserts, and wax stirrers. Bombshell Wax Company offers a wide range of options for spas, salons, and waxing professionals, with warmers in sizes from 14-ounce to 12-pound reservoirs - both digital and analog temperature control options for precise, adjustable settings. Choose from trusted brands like DEO and Equipro, available in single and double warmer options.

Our products are designed to endure heavy, frequent use, combining strength and durability with top industry standards. Pair these reliable warmers with Bombshell’s warmer cleaner: Kiss it Goodbye, for easy clean up and Bombshell’s specially formulated wax, which melts at a lower temperature to help wax artists work quickly and efficiently.

settings.block_title_question: Why is a wax warmer necessary?
settings.block_description_question: A wax warmer is essential for salon service efficiency. Warmers keep your wax ready to use at the ideal temperature, ensuring consistency and safety during application. Using a dedicated warmer allows the wax to melt evenly, minimizing risk of burns and making the waxing process more effective and comfortable.

settings.block_title_question: How do I use a Bombshell Wax Warmer?
settings.block_description_question: Start by adding the appropriate amount of wax beads/chunks or your strip wax can. Set the warmer to your desired temperature, allow the wax to melt thoroughly. Once melted, stir the wax to check its consistency, then test a small amount on your wrist to ensure it's at a comfortable temperature before application.

settings.block_title_question: How do I clean a Bombshell Wax warmer? How often should I?
settings.block_description_question: For best results, clean your wax warmer at least once a month. Regular cleaning prevents old wax from affecting the quality of new wax, as prolonged exposure to temperature changes can break down wax consistency. Try to use up as much of the remaining wax as possible before cleaning. Then, remove all melted wax to fully reset the warmer, ensuring optimal performance with fresh wax.

settings.block_title_question: How long does it typically take for wax to melt?
settings.block_description_question: Most wax takes about 15–30 minutes to melt fully, depending on the warmer’s temperature setting and the amount of wax used. For best results, start with a mid-level heat and adjust as needed until the wax reaches a smooth, honey-like consistency.

settings.block_title_question: Can I use different waxes with Bombshell Wax warmers?
settings.block_description_question: Yes, Bombshell Wax warmers are versatile and can handle various types of hard wax - from beads to chunks - and strip wax cans. Some of our clients even enjoy mixing different hard waxes in the same pot. We recommend using Bombshell Wax products for the best results!

Absolutely! Bombshell Wax warmers are designed with ease of use in mind, making them great for beginners and seasoned professionals alike. With straightforward controls and user-friendly features, they help make the waxing process efficient, safe, and accessible for anyone starting out.

settings.description_asked: Frequently Asked Questions related to Wax Warmers:
settings.section_title: Never miss our updates about new arrivals and special offers

settings.block_content: A superior Beeswax blend, carefully sourced with ethical standards.
Adheres more to the hair and not the skin, leaving the skin feeling soft & supple and clients feeling confident & fresh.
Doing business together, we help animals, people, plants and our planet to thrive.
